'''zhosasaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:nicish|nicish]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| zh-s-s
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nicish|nicish]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zhosasaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosasithi|zhosasithi]] || [[word:zhosasiji|zhosasiji]] || [[word:zhosasishi|zhosasishi]] || [[word:zhosasiki|zhosasiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosasuthuthu|zhosasuthuthu]] || [[word:zhosasujuju|zhosasujuju]] || [[word:zhosasushushu|zhosasushushu]] || [[word:zhosasukuku|zhosasukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosasuthu|zhosasuthu]] || [[word:zhosasuju|zhosasuju]] || [[word:zhosasushu|zhosasushu]] || [[word:zhosasuku|zhosasuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosasufthuf|zhosasufthuf]] || [[word:zhosasufjuf|zhosasufjuf]] || [[word:zhosasufshuf|zhosasufshuf]] || [[word:zhosasufkuf|zhosasufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosasethe|zhosasethe]] || [[word:zhosaseje|zhosaseje]] || [[word:zhosaseshe|zhosaseshe]] || [[word:zhosaseke|zhosaseke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosasothotho|zhosasothotho]] || [[word:zhosasojojo|zhosasojojo]] || [[word:zhosasoshosho|zhosasoshosho]] || [[word:zhosasokoko|zhosasokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosasotho|zhosasotho]] || [[word:zhosasojo|zhosasojo]] || [[word:zhosasosho|zhosasosho]] || [[word:zhosasoko|zhosasoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosasofthof|zhosasofthof]] || [[word:zhosasofjof|zhosasofjof]] || [[word:zhosasofshof|zhosasofshof]] || [[word:zhosasofkof|zhosasofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfthĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfjĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfshĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfkĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfthĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfjĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfshĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfkĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfthĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfjĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfshĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zhosasĂŻfkĂŻf|zhosasĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zhosasĂŠthĂŠ|zhosasĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zhosasĂŠjĂŠ|zhosasĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zhosasĂŠshĂŠ|zhosasĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zhosasĂŠkĂŠ|zhosasĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zhosasathatha|zhosasathatha]] || [[word:zhosasajaja|zhosasajaja]] || [[word:zhosasashasha|zhosasashasha]] || [[word:zhosasakaka|zhosasakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zhosasatha|zhosasatha]] || [[word:zhosasaja|zhosasaja]] || [[word:zhosasasha|zhosasasha]] || [[word:zhosasaka|zhosasaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zhosasafthaf|zhosasafthaf]] || [[word:zhosasafjaf|zhosasafjaf]] || [[word:zhosasafshaf|zhosasafshaf]] || [[word:zhosasafkaf|zhosasafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zhosasasha|zhosasasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosashĂ«sha|zhosashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosasrosha|zhosasrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosasmusha|zhosasmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosasyasha|zhosasyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosasnkshĂ«sha|gozhosasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosasnkrosha|gozhosasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosasnkmusha|gozhosasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosasnkyasha|gozhosasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zhosasasasha|zhosasasasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosasashĂ«sha|zhosasashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosasasrosha|zhosasasrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosasasmusha|zhosasasmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosasasyasha|zhosasasyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosasasnkshĂ«sha|gozhosasasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosasasnkrosha|gozhosasasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosasasnkmusha|gozhosasasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosasasnkyasha|gozhosasasnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zhesĂŠsasha|zhesĂŠsasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhesĂŠshĂ«sha|zhesĂŠshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhesĂŠsrosha|zhesĂŠsrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhesĂŠsmusha|zhesĂŠsmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhesĂŠsyasha|zhesĂŠsyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhesĂŠsnkshĂ«sha|gozhesĂŠsnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhesĂŠsnkrosha|gozhesĂŠsnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhesĂŠsnkmusha|gozhesĂŠsnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhesĂŠsnkyasha|gozhesĂŠsnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zhosfasasha|zhosfasasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zhosfashĂ«sha|zhosfashĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zhosfasrosha|zhosfasrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zhosfasmusha|zhosfasmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zhosfasyasha|zhosfasyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozhosfasnkshĂ«sha|gozhosfasnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozhosfasnkrosha|gozhosfasnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozhosfasnkmusha|gozhosfasnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozhosfasnkyasha|gozhosfasnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|718161e}}
